mechanics.excerpt: CHARACTER CREATION YAKUZA MECHWARRIOR Born into poverty in Japanese neighborhood of the predominately Azami city on the planet Arkab_ you were forced to associate with local Azami t0 survive This further erod ed your already shaky Japanese and left you with social stigma in the eyes of other Combine citizens_ With little hope of rising above your station you turned t0 life of crime where your quick thinking_ street smarts and luck brought you to the attention of the local gumi at young age.
